title: National Photography Exhibition: Gold Medal
description: UIUPC secured the top honor at the Grand National Photo Summit for 'Excellence in Visual Storytelling', competing against 50+ regional clubs.

title: Best University Club of the Year
description: Awarded by the Student Affairs Directorate for consistent contribution to campus culture through workshops, exhibitions, and professional coverage.

title: International Collaboration: Global Frames
description: Hosted a cross-border virtual exhibition with photographers from 5 countries, fostering a global dialogue on documentary photography and heritage.

title: Visual Literacy Initiative Launch
description: Successfully trained over 500 students in foundational photography through our community-led peer mentorship program, defining the club's educational mission.
